HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

12#include "Bsp3D.h"
13#include <cmath>
14
16#define BSPTHRESH 1e-6
17
18
19// ----------------------------------
20// Construction & destruction
21// ----------------------------------
22
23Bsp3D::Bsp3D() : bud(false) { elements.clear(); }
24
25Bsp3D::~Bsp3D() { delete bspInside; delete bspOutside; }
26
27// ----------------------------------
28// Build operations
29// ----------------------------------
30
31// Choose the last pushed element as splitter and remove it from the queue.
32bool Bsp3D::SetSplitter() {
33 splitter = elements.back();
34 elements.pop_back();
35 return true;
36}
37
38// Wrap a triangle into a working polygon (copy the 3 vertices).
39bool Bsp3D::AddElement(Triangle *inElement, int inSide) {
40 bspPolygon *poly = new bspPolygon;
41 poly->origin = inElement;
42 poly->side = inSide;
43 for (int i(0); i < 3; i++) poly->nodes.push_back(inElement->Node(i));
44 elements.push_back(poly);
45 return true;
46}
47
48// Add polygon to list
49bool Bsp3D::AddElement(bspPolygon *poly) {
50 elements.push_back(poly);
51 return true;
52}
53
54// Set this branch to a bud (leaf): branch with no elements
55bool Bsp3D::SetBud() {
56 bud = true;
57 return true;
58}
59
60// Query if this branch is a bud
61bool Bsp3D::IsBud() { return bud; }
62
63// ----------------------------------
64// Geometry: plane classification
65// ----------------------------------
66
67// Test if a point is outside, inside or in plane with this branch's splitter
68int Bsp3D::LocTest(rvec test) {
69 double dist = LocDist(test);
70 if (dist > BSPTHRESH)
71 return 1; // Outside
72 else if (dist < -BSPTHRESH)
73 return -1; // Inside
74 else
75 return 0; // In plane
76}
77
78// Distance to splitter plane
79double Bsp3D::LocDist(rvec test) {
80 rvec ref = splitter->origin->Center();
81 rvec normal = splitter->origin->FBNormalVector(1 - splitter->side);
82 rvec diff(test - ref);
83 double proj(dot(diff, normal));
84 return proj;
85}
86
87// ----------------------------------
88// Core: split & dispatch
89// ----------------------------------
90
91/* Assign poly to proper branch, split if necessary.
92 * Returns true if poly has been split into new polygons and can be deleted
93 * Returns false if poly remains needed
94 */
95bool Bsp3D::SplitPoly(bspPolygon *poly) {
96 bool inside(false);
97 bool outside(false);
98 std::vector<int> location;
99 for (uint i(0); i < poly->nodes.size(); i++) {
100 switch (LocTest(poly->nodes.at(i))) {
101 case -1: // point is inside
102 inside = true;
103 location.push_back(-1);
104 break;
105 case 1: // point is outside
106 outside = true;
107 location.push_back(1);
108 break;
109 case 0: // point is in plane
110 location.push_back(0);
111 }
112 }
113
114 // poly intersects splitter: split into two polygons
115 if (inside && outside) {
116 // Determine intersection location and add nodes
117 if (location.front() * location.back() == -1) {
118 double dFirst = LocDist(poly->nodes.front());
119 double dLast = LocDist(poly->nodes.back());
120 dFirst = dLast / (dFirst - dLast);
121 if (dFirst < 0) dFirst = -dFirst;
122 dLast = 1. - dFirst;
123 poly->nodes.push_back(dFirst * poly->nodes.front() +
124 dLast * poly->nodes.back());
125 location.push_back(0);
126 }
127 for (uint i(0); i < location.size() - 1; i++) {
128 if (location.at(i) * location.at(i + 1) == -1) {
129 std::vector<rvec>::iterator nodeIter = poly->nodes.begin();
130 std::vector<int>::iterator locIter = location.begin();
131 for (uint j(0); j < i + 1; j++) {
132 nodeIter++;
133 locIter++;
134 }
135 double dFirst = LocDist(poly->nodes.at(i));
136 double dLast = LocDist(poly->nodes.at(i + 1));
137 dFirst = dLast / (dFirst - dLast);
138 if (dFirst < 0) dFirst = -dFirst;
139 dLast = 1. - dFirst;
140 poly->nodes.insert(nodeIter, 1, dFirst * poly->nodes.at(i) +
141 dLast * poly->nodes.at(i + 1));
142 location.insert(locIter, 1, 0);
143 }
144 }
145 // Create new polygons
146 bspPolygon *polyIn = new bspPolygon;
147 bspPolygon *polyOut = new bspPolygon;
148 polyIn->origin = poly->origin;
149 polyIn->side = poly->side;
150 polyOut->origin = poly->origin;
151 polyOut->side = poly->side;
152 for (uint i(0); i < location.size(); i++) {
153 switch (location.at(i)) {
154 case -1:
155 polyIn->nodes.push_back(poly->nodes.at(i));
156 break;
157 case 1:
158 polyOut->nodes.push_back(poly->nodes.at(i));
159 break;
160 case 0:
161 polyIn->nodes.push_back(poly->nodes.at(i));
162 polyOut->nodes.push_back(poly->nodes.at(i));
163 }
164 }
165 bspInside->AddElement(polyIn);
166 bspOutside->AddElement(polyOut);
167 // poly is no longer needed, can be deleted (true)
168 return true;
169 } else if (inside)
170 bspInside->AddElement(poly);
171 else if (outside)
172 bspOutside->AddElement(poly);
173 // poly still needed, do not delete!
174 return false;
175}
176
177// Perform branching: assign all elements to outside or inside subbranches (or both)
178bool Bsp3D::Branch() {
179 bspInside = new Bsp3D;
180 bspOutside = new Bsp3D;
181
182 for (std::vector<bspPolygon *>::iterator elem = elements.begin();
183 elem != elements.end(); elem++) {
184 if (SplitPoly(*elem)) // true if poly has been cloned
185 delete *elem;
186 }
187
188 if ((int)(bspInside->elements.size()) == 0) {
189 bspInside->SetBud();
190 } else {
191 bspInside->SetSplitter();
192 bspInside->Branch();
193 }
194 // ... and the same for the outside branch
195 if ((int)(bspOutside->elements.size()) == 0) {
196 bspOutside->SetBud();
197 } else {
198 bspOutside->SetSplitter();
199 bspOutside->Branch();
200 }
201 return true;
202}
203
204// ----------------------------------
205// Queries
206// ----------------------------------
207
214bool WriteNode(rvec in) {
215 std::cout << in(0) << " " << in(1) << " " << in(2) << " ";
216 return 0;
217}
218
219// Test if point is inside or outside of branch
220int Bsp3D::TestPoint(rvec point) {
221 if (LocTest(point) == 1) { // outside
222 if (bspOutside->IsBud()) {
223 return 1;
224 } else {
225 return bspOutside->TestPoint(point);
226 }
227 } else { // LocTest(point) <= 0 -> inside (by convention)
228 if (bspInside->IsBud()) {
229 return -1;
230 } else {
231 return bspInside->TestPoint(point);
232 }
233 }
234}
235
BSPTHRESH
#define BSPTHRESH
Distance tolerance for classifying points against a splitter plane.
